_doc: Path B (zero-spend SEO) post tracker. Per CLAUDE_GHP_CEO.md: 1 post/week max, kill criterion = 8 posts (~60 days) with $0 in revenue triggers Path C honest pivot. Track only revenue and one leading indicator (organic clicks). Verify ranking via free Google Search Console once site is verified there.
kill_criterion: REWRITTEN 2026-05-06: original '8 posts × $0 → Path C' was set well below the SEO sandbox window (3-6 months for new domains). Replaced with stage-gated diagnostic triggers — see CLAUDE_GHP_CEO.md. Stage-1 evaluation date: 2026-06-05 (30 days from GSC verify); 0 impressions = wrong cluster, NOT dead strategy.

daily_snapshots.interpretation: Amazon clicks collapsed ~99% from April (~521) to May (6 in 5 days). IG 0-engagement streak has cut top-of-funnel traffic to a trickle. Yesterday's CTA reroute (Amazon search → Impact storefront) cannot be meaningfully tested at this volume. GSC has no data yet — verified <24h ago. Hold per CEO prompt; do not write post #8.

daily_snapshots.interpretation: First Google-required field-level fix in the schema stack. Every prior on-page polish prediction (5, 6, 10, 12, 14, 16) staked null on the assumption that Google was evaluating the schema and sandbox-suppressing the result. Today's finding flips that prior: Google's Review rich snippet was silently ineligible on every post because Product.review.reviewRating was missing. Prediction #18 stakes whether the 2026-05-21 eval flips eligibility, which would invalidate the 'sandbox dominates' framing of the prior 6 stakes.

cadence_violation_2026-05-05: 7 posts published in 12 days violates CEO rule #1 (1 post/week max). All 7 target near-identical 'waterproof stretch sofa cover' keyword cluster — diminishing return per post. NEXT ACTION = stop posting, wait for GSC indexing + organic clicks, monitor Amazon Associates daily for first conversion. Do NOT publish week-2 post until at least 2026-05-12 AND only if first 7 have produced organic impressions.

Stretch jacquard genuinely fits the query. Hold until 2026-05-12 minimum to respect cadence and let existing 7 posts get crawled.

kill_criterion_status_2026-05-06: Original 8-post threshold retired as too aggressive. SEO sandbox is 3-6 months on new domains; quitting at 8 posts in 12 days would be premature surrender, not a kill criterion. Replaced with stage-gated diagnostic triggers in CLAUDE_GHP_CEO.md. First evaluation date: 2026-06-05 (30 days post-GSC-verify). 5 publishing workflows remain paused so cadence stays at ≤1/week max while existing 8 posts are improved (schema added, internal linking next).
